name: AutoCorp Logistics Agent
description: Autonomous logistics optimization agent. Evaluates freight options, books optimal transport, tracks shipments in real-time, and confirms delivery. Operates within AutoCorp autonomous business swarm.

capabilities.name: evaluate_freight
capabilities.description: Evaluates available freight options for a given route and quantity, scores them on cost/speed/reliability

capabilities.name: book_transport
capabilities.description: Books the optimal freight option and initiates shipment tracking

capabilities.name: track_shipment
capabilities.description: Returns current tracking status for a shipment
